overall.description: First-person exploration of a rain-soaked futuristic city at night, descending and ascending stairs between highway levels while walking along an elevated promenade lined with palm trees and street lamps. The scene features the distinctive teal-green neon-noir aesthetic of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City.

events.description: begins descending concrete stairs toward the highway level below
view opens to reveal the highway underpass structure and traffic below

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated platform overlooking the neon-lit city skyline, then turning to descend a stairway toward the highway level

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on driving along the highway below, moving away from camera

entered.detail: tall futuristic towers with illuminated windows and neon signage dominating the skyline
tall building with large vertical digital advertisements and colorful neon displays
elevated multi-lane road structure with vehicles visible below
metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated platform
wide concrete stairway with metal railings leading down to highway level

segments.scene_description: Standing on an elevated platform overlooking a rain-soaked futuristic city at night, with towering glass skyscrapers and neon billboards visible through the haze. The camera walks forward along the platform, then begins descending stairs toward the highway below where sparse traffic moves along the wet roads.

events.description: reaches bottom of stairs, entering the sheltered space beneath the highway overpass
begins ascending the stairway leading up to the elevated promenade

agents.ego_description: walking briefly along the lower highway level beneath the overpass, then turning to ascend a long concrete stairway flanked by metal railings

entered.detail: vehicles with headlights and taillights visible driving along the highway at eye level
tall concrete wall separating the pedestrian area from the highway
underside of the highway overpass creating a covered, tunnel-like environment
long flight of concrete stairs leading upward to the promenade level
metal safety railings along both sides of the stairway
tall palm trees silhouetted against the city lights at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: Having reached the highway level, the scene shifts to the sheltered, concrete environment beneath the overpass with the sound of traffic nearby. The camera walks past the retaining wall and begins ascending a long stairway, with palm trees visible at the top against the night sky, transitioning from the enclosed underpass back into the open rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront promenade with palm trees

events.description: emerges from stairway onto the wide, rain-slicked promenade with open city views
vehicle passes by on the lower highway to the left, visible through the rain and haze

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide, wet promenade lined with palm trees and street lamps, with the glowing futuristic city skyline ahead

entered.detail: tall street lamps with bright overhead lights illuminating the rainy walkway at regular intervals
dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers and high-rise buildings forming the city center
large glowing advertisement screen mounted on a building facade
metal railing along the edge of the promenade overlooking the lower level
wide concrete walkway reflecting the street lights and neon signs in the rain

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the wide elevated promenade, the scene opens up to reveal a sweeping view of the rain-soaked futuristic city. Tall palm trees line the left side of the walkway while street lamps cast pools of light on the wet concrete. The camera walks steadily forward toward the glowing skyline, with the highway now visible below to the left and neon billboards illuminating the buildings ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a high vantage point into a concrete underpass before ascending to a wide, neon-lit promenade. It begins on an elevated platform overlooking a rain-soaked futuristic city of glass skyscrapers and neon billboards, moving forward before descending a set of stairs toward the wet highway below. As the camera reaches the lower level, the environment shifts into the sheltered, enclosed space beneath a concrete overpass, where it passes a retaining wall and begins climbing a long stairway. The scene then opens up as the camera emerges from the underpass back into the rain, transitioning onto a broad elevated walkway lined with tall palm trees and glowing street lamps. Finally, the camera walks steadily forward toward the luminous skyline, with the highway visible below and vibrant neon signs illuminating the path ahead.
